content.title: Why Cất Cánh, and why you

cards.heading: Why Cất Cánh exists
cards.body: To help talented Vietnamese students find their direction abroad, with guidance from those who have walked the path before.

cards.heading: Why this cohort
cards.body: You were selected from a strong applicant pool for your potential, your drive, and your readiness to take the next step.

content.pullquote: "You were chosen on purpose, not by chance."
